# bytts usage guide for AI agents

`bytts` is a free, browser-based text-to-speech app (Next.js App Router, React 19).
Two Edge Runtime routes proxy Microsoft's free "Edge Read Aloud" speech pipeline
(SSML in, `audio/mpeg` out) and gate an optional password. Everything else —
voice/rate/pitch controls, long-text splitting, generation history, and a
pluggable provider registry — runs in the browser. **No server database, no
Cloudflare bindings, no tests.**

Primary docs:

- README: ./README.md
- Design spec (authoritative): ./DESIGN.md
- Built-in providers: ./src/lib/builtin-apis.ts

Part of the `@cdlab/projects-monorepo`; run all commands from the repo root with
`pnpm --filter @cdlab/bytts <script>` (or `pnpm dev:bytts`).

## What it is

- **Two server surfaces, both Edge Runtime** (`export const runtime = 'edge'`):
  `POST /api/tts` (synthesis) and `GET|POST /api/config` (password). No other
  server code. No KV/D1/R2, no `wrangler.jsonc`.
- **All persistence is client-side:** Zustand + localStorage + IndexedDB.
- **Deploy target:** Cloudflare Pages via `@cloudflare/next-on-pages` (Pages
  Functions, not a raw Worker). `output: 'standalone'` is a Node fallback.
- **Live:** https://bytts.pages.dev/

## Data flow (generate a clip)

TTSForm (`src/components/tts-form.tsx`) → `splitText` → per-segment request →
merge blobs → history.

1. `splitText(text, splitLength)` — width-aware, punctuation-preferring split.
2. `genid.nextId()` → requestId; `addHistory(PROCESSING)`.
3. Per segment: for `edge-api`, POST `{text, voice, rate, pitch, preview}` to
   `/api/tts`.
4. Server `/api/tts`: `refreshEndpoint()` (cached MS token) → `generateSsml()` +
   `escapeXml` → POST `{region}.tts.speech.microsoft.com/cognitiveservices/v1` →
   return `audio/mpeg`.
5. Client merges segment blobs into one `Blob`; `updateHistory(COMPLETED,
   audioBlob)`.
6. Blob → IndexedDB (`tts-history-data`, keyed by id); metadata → localStorage
   (`bytts-results`).

**Preview** = `generateVoice(true)`: synthesizes `text.slice(0,20)`, plays via an
object URL, writes **no** history.

## Key files

- `src/app/api/tts/route.ts` — Edge synthesis proxy. Module-scoped token cache
  (`expiredAt`/`endpoint`), `refreshInFlight` de-dup, HMAC `X-MT-Signature`
  (hardcoded key), SSML build, `escapeXml` before assembly, voice regex
  `VOICE_NAME_RE`.
- `src/app/api/config/route.ts` — password endpoint; plain string compare.
- `src/lib/utils.ts` — `escapeXml` (preserves `<break time="…s"/>`), `splitText`
  (non-ASCII = width 2, 300-unit back-scan, 6 priority tiers).
- `src/lib/builtin-apis.ts` — `BUILTIN_APIS` (`edge-api`, `oai-tts`),
  `isBuiltinId`.
- `src/components/tts-form.tsx` — input + controls; builds per-provider request
  bodies; drives split/dispatch/preview/history.
- `src/components/api-manager.tsx` — add/edit custom providers, built-in
  override/restore, batch delete, JSON import/export.
- `src/components/history-section.tsx` — history grid, waveform player,
  download-one / download-all-as-ZIP.
- `src/components/PasswordGate.tsx` — client render gate (reads `/api/config`).
- `src/store/useApiStore.ts` — providers (`bytts-custom-apis`).
- `src/store/useHistoryStore.ts` — history split-storage (`bytts-results` + IDB).
- `src/lib/storage.ts` — `createIDBStore('tts-history-data')`.
- `src/lib/genid.ts` — `GenidOptimized({workerId:1})` (`@cdlab/driftflake`).
- `public/speakers.json` — static ~290 edge voices for the picker.

## Providers (src/lib/builtin-apis.ts, useApiStore.ts)

- Two formats: `edge` (`{text,voice,rate,pitch,preview}`) and `openai`
  (`/v1/audio/speech`).
- Built-ins: `edge-api` (edge, `/api/tts`, max 50000 / split 5000) and `oai-tts`
  (openai, `https://oai-tts.zwei.de.eu.org/v1/audio/speech`, 9 voices, max 4096).
- Custom providers persist in localStorage `bytts-custom-apis`
  (id `custom-${Date.now()}`); built-in overrides merge as
  `{...BUILTIN_APIS[id], ...override}` (restorable).
- Request-shape rules:
  - `oai-tts`: `{model:'tts-1', input:cleanText, voice:<speaker>, response_format}`,
    `<break>` stripped.
  - custom `openai`: `{model:<speaker>, input:cleanText, voice:'alloy',
    response_format}` — selected voice becomes the model, voice hardcoded `alloy`.
  - custom `edge`: `{text:escapeXml(text), voice, rate, pitch, preview}`.
- Auth header: configured name carries the key VERBATIM on TTS requests; only the
  model-list fetch auto-prefixes `Bearer ` when the header is `Authorization`.

## Config / bindings

- No bindings. Config is `process.env`, read directly in routes/layout:
  `ACCESS_PASSWORD` (empty = no gate), `PERSIST_PASSWORD` (`false` = re-enter each
  session), `MICROSOFT_CLIENTTRACEID` (optional trace seed), `BUILD_TIME`
  (injected in `next.config.ts`, version footer). All optional — app runs with
  none set.

## Gotchas for agents

- `/api/tts` is UNAUTHENTICATED — `PasswordGate` gates the UI only, not the API.
  Do not describe the password as backend access control.
- SSML injection defense is SERVER-SIDE: the route always calls `escapeXml`
  before building SSML, and validates `voice` against `VOICE_NAME_RE`. Built-in
  `edge-api` sends raw text (server escapes); custom `edge` also escapes
  client-side. Do not remove the server escape.
- `escapeXml` deliberately PRESERVES `<break time="…s"/>` tags — don't "simplify"
  it into a plain XML-escape.
- Token cache is module-scoped = per warm isolate only (not shared across edge
  isolates); `refreshInFlight` de-dups concurrent refreshes. This is intentional.
- The built-in voice depends on a reverse-engineered MS endpoint (hardcoded HMAC
  key, spoofed headers) — not official Azure. Flag as a durability/ToS risk.
- History storage is SPLIT: blobs in IndexedDB, metadata in localStorage;
  `partialize` strips blobs and drops `PROCESSING` items. Don't persist blobs to
  localStorage.
- `build` forces the WEBPACK builder (`next build --webpack`) — do not switch to
  Turbopack. There is NO test script; there is NO `wrangler.jsonc`.

## Common commands

```bash
pnpm dev:bytts                          # http://bytts.localhost:3355
pnpm --filter @cdlab/bytts typecheck    # tsc --noEmit
pnpm --filter @cdlab/bytts lint         # next lint
pnpm --filter @cdlab/bytts build        # next build --webpack
pnpm --filter @cdlab/bytts run build:cf # next-on-pages (Cloudflare Pages)
```
